items.title: Autonomous vehicle startups raised a record $21.4B across 34 deals through April 15, up from $5.9B raised across 99 investments globally in all of 2025 (Mary Ann Azevedo/Crunchbase News)
items.title_original: Autonomous vehicle startups raised a record $21.4B across 34 deals through April 15, up from $5.9B raised across 99 investments globally in all of 2025 (Mary Ann Azevedo/Crunchbase News)
items.title_en: Autonomous vehicle startups raised a record $21.4B across 34 deals through April 15, up from $5.9B raised across 99 investments globally in all of 2025 (Mary Ann Azevedo/Crunchbase News)
items.title_zh: 截至 4 月 15 日，自动驾驶汽车初创公司通过 34 笔交易筹集了创纪录的 21.4 亿美元，高于 2025 年全球 99 笔投资筹集的 5.9 亿美元（Mary Ann Azevedo/Crunchbase News）
items.title_bilingual: 截至 4 月 15 日，自动驾驶汽车初创公司通过 34 笔交易筹集了创纪录的 21.4 亿美元，高于 2025 年全球 99 笔投资筹集的 5.9 亿美元（Mary Ann Azevedo/Crunchbase News） / Autonomous vehicle startups raised a record $21.4B across 34 deals through April 15, up from $5.9B raised across 99 investments globally in all of 2025 (Mary Ann Azevedo/Crunchbase News)

items.title: The EC awards a six-year, €180M sovereign cloud contract to four European providers as part of a push to reduce the EU's dependence on non-European tech (Leo Marchandon/Reuters)
items.title_original: The EC awards a six-year, €180M sovereign cloud contract to four European providers as part of a push to reduce the EU's dependence on non-European tech (Leo Marchandon/Reuters)
items.title_en: The EC awards a six-year, €180M sovereign cloud contract to four European providers as part of a push to reduce the EU's dependence on non-European tech (Leo Marchandon/Reuters)
items.title_zh: 作为减少欧盟对非欧洲技术依赖的努力的一部分，欧盟委员会向四家欧洲提供商授予了一份为期六年、价值 1.8 亿欧元的主权云合同（Leo Marchandon/路透社）
items.title_bilingual: 作为减少欧盟对非欧洲技术依赖的努力的一部分，欧盟委员会向四家欧洲提供商授予了一份为期六年、价值 1.8 亿欧元的主权云合同（Leo Marchandon/路透社） / The EC awards a six-year, €180M sovereign cloud contract to four European providers as part of a push to reduce the EU's dependence on non-European tech (Leo Marchandon/Reuters)

items.title: Sources suggest Anthropic's holding back from a wider Mythos release until it can reliably serve it to customers; Anthropic has suffered outages in recent weeks (Financial Times)

items.title_en: Sources suggest Anthropic's holding back from a wider Mythos release until it can reliably serve it to customers; Anthropic has suffered outages in recent weeks (Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 有消息称，Anthropic 将推迟发布更广泛的 Mythos，直到能够可靠地为客户提供服务为止。 Anthropic 最近几周遭遇中断（金融时报）
items.title_bilingual: 有消息称，Anthropic 将推迟发布更广泛的 Mythos，直到能够可靠地为客户提供服务为止。 Anthropic 最近几周遭遇中断（金融时报） / Sources suggest Anthropic's holding back from a wider Mythos release until it can reliably serve it to customers; Anthropic has suffered outages in recent weeks (Financial Times)
